cAmSRL">What makes Little Spoon different?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg quality isn’t just about taste — it’s about trust. Our USDA-certified organic<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/babyblends"><strong>Babyblends<!-- --> and <!-- -->Babyblends<!-- -->+</strong></a> <!-- -->are rigorously tested for heavy metals, pesticides, and plasticizers, ensuring we go beyond U.S. regulations and meet or exceed the strictest EU standards.</p><p>We’re proud to be the first U.S. baby food brand to set strict limits on 500+ toxins — with lead, arsenic, and cadmium limits that set a new industry benchmark. No product leaves our hands unless it meets our safety standards — period.</p><p>But we’re so much more than baby food.</p><p><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/smoothies"><strong>Smoothies + YoGos</strong></a> <!-- -->— Don’t let the dessert-inspired names fool you. These pouches pack in organic veggies and superfoods and meet the same best-in-class safety standards as our Babyblends.</p><p><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/biteables"><strong>Biteables</strong></a> <!-- -->— Soft, pinchable meals that encourage independent eating, tested with the same rigorous safety and transparency standards.</p><p><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/plates"><strong>Plates</strong></a>,<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/snacks"><strong>Snacks</strong></a> <!-- -->+<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/lunchers"><strong>Lunchers</strong></a> <!-- -->— Crafted with high-quality ingredients, responsibly sourced produce, and a commitment to clean eating. We keep a 100+ ingredient no-list, meaning you won't find the artificial preservatives, synthetic flavors, high-fructose corn syrup, or other unnecessary additives that you find in other grocery store options.</p><p>At Little Spoon, we never stop striving for better. We’re constantly evolving, improving, and raising the bar on safety, transparency, and quality. Because feeding your little one shouldn’t be a guessing game — it should be easy, trustworthy, and, most importantly, the best it can possibly be.</p><p>From first bites to big-kid meals, we’re committed to making every stage safer, better-for-your-kiddos, and easier for parents.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">What is the Little Spoon Taste Guarantee?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>As parents ourselves, we know that introducing new flavors to kids can take time and patience…lots of patience. Our Taste Guarantee was created to help you explore our menu without hesitation. If your child isn’t loving one of our meals or snacks, we’ll issue you credit you can use towards your next order.<br/>How it works:</p><ul><li class="sc-11bcb067-4 iUEzty"><i>Request credit within 30 days of delivery.</i></li><li class="sc-11bcb067-4 iUEzty"><i>Have a quick chat with our Care Team + share your thoughts so we can show up even better for our Spooners.</i></li><li class="sc-11bcb067-4 iUEzty"><i>Your credit amount will be equal to the items that didn’t quite hit the spot—apply ‘em to your next order.</i></li></ul></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">How does Little Spoon work?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Life with kids? Safe to say it's a little unpredictable. That's why we're flexible! We're not into locking you in - we're all about giving you the freedom to call the shots.</p><p>Change of plans? No problem! Cancel, skip, pause or shift orders whenever you need to. Once that first box of Little Spoon is on its way to your door, you're in the driver's seat. Want to take a break? Go for it. Need to switch things up? You've got it. Change your menu, add new products, swap out your shipping address...it's all easy.<!-- --> </p><p>We believe in nourishing both your little ones and your peace of mind, so we keep things easy, breezy, and delicious.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">What are Little Spoon’s transparency standards?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>At Little Spoon, we’ve always prioritized food safety and transparency — and now, we’re raising the bar even higher. We’ve strengthened our industry-leading testing standards for heavy metals, pesticides, and plasticizers across all baby and toddler products — raising the bar for food safety and transparency.</p><p>Here’s what that looks like:</p><p><strong><span role="img" aria-label="check">✔️</span> <!-- -->Stricter limits on heavy metals</strong> <!-- -->— aligned with or exceeding EU benchmarks:</p><ul><li class="sc-11bcb067-4 iUEzty">Lead: ≤10 ppb</li><li class="sc-11bcb067-4 iUEzty">Arsenic: ≤20 ppb (≤40 ppb for cereal)</li><li class="sc-11bcb067-4 iUEzty">Cadmium: ≤40 ppb</li><li class="sc-11bcb067-4 iUEzty">Mercury: ≤3 ppb</li></ul><p><strong><span role="img" aria-label="check">✔️</span> <!-- -->Expanded safety testing for babies and toddlers</strong> <!-- -->— Blends, Biteables, Puffs, Cereal, Smoothies and YoGos.</p><p><strong><span role="img" aria-label="check">✔️</span> <!-- -->A commitment to full transparency<!-- --> </strong>— no product hits your doorstep unless it meets our strict safety standards.</p><p>Parents shouldn’t have to hope their baby’s food is safe. We believe in proving it.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">How do you ensure the quality and safety of your food?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Ensuring the safety and quality of our food is at the heart of everything we do. We rigorously test all of our baby and toddler products — including Babyblends, Biteables, Puffs, Cereal, Smoothies and YoGos — for heavy metals, pesticides, and BPA/BPS to ensure they surpass U.S. regulations and align with best-in-class E.U. standards.</p><p>Our commitment doesn’t stop there. We use cutting-edge cold pressure technology and innovative proprietary packaging to lock in fresh flavors and the nutrients your little one deserves. Every meal is crafted with care — so you can feel confident about every bite.</p><p>We’ve also partnered with the Clean Label Project, a trusted advocate for consumer health and safety, to set strict testing limits across our entire baby and toddler product portfolio. Together, we’re on a mission to raise the bar on food safety and nutrition for growing little ones.</p><p>When you choose Little Spoon, you're choosing meals that are not only delicious and nutritious but also backed by the latest in food safety technology and our unwavering commitment to transparency. Your child's well-being is our top priority, and we're honored to be a part of their journey toward a healthier, happier future.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">What is the The Little Spoon 'No-No' list?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Our 'No-No' list is a commitment to avoid over 100 ingredients and additives commonly found in other brands but not meeting our strict safety and quality standards. This includes synthetic colors, high fructose corn syrup, synthetic nitrites, and more. You can view the whole list<!-- --> <a href="https://www.littlespoon.com/resources/no-no-ingredients.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">here</a>.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">How do I start solids with Little Spoon?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Ready to start solids with Little Spoon? Here’s your guide to an exciting flavor journey! Most babies start between 4-6 months. Check with your pediatrician to ensure it’s the right time for your little one.</p><p>Some signs that your baby may be ready to start solids:</p><p><strong>* Sitting Steady:</strong> If your baby can sit up with some support, they’re gearing up for solids.</p><p><strong>* Head Control:</strong> Strong head control is essential for safe and comfortable eating.</p><p><strong>* Less Tongue Reflex:</strong> When the tongue thrust reflex begins to fade, it’s a good sign your baby can handle solid foods.</p><p><strong>* Curiosity About Food:</strong> If your baby’s watching what you eat or eyeing plates, they’re showing interest!</p><p><i><strong>Pro-tip:</strong> Keep your camera close to capture those first bites – it’s a milestone moment! Little Spoon’s 5 stages of<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/babyblends"><strong>Babyblends</strong></a> <!-- -->are crafted to support each step of your solids journey, and our rice-free, organic<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/baby-cereal"><strong>Baby Cereal</strong></a> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/puffs"><strong>Meltable Puffs</strong></a> <!-- -->and great companions for starting solids!</i></p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">How do I know when my baby is ready for Biteables?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Knowing when your baby is ready for table foods is an exciting milestone. Generally, most babies are ready to explore beyond purees and venture into the world of table foods around 8 to 9 months of age. Look out for signs of readiness like improved head control, sitting with support, showing interest in what you're eating, and even trying to grab food from your plate.</p><p><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/biteables"><strong>Biteables</strong></a> <!-- -->are small, soft, and easy-to-hold pieces that are safe for their developing chewing skills. As always, pay attention to your baby's cues and consult your pediatrician for personalized guidance. Every baby is unique, and we're here to support you on this fun and exciting journey!</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">What ages are Plates for?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Our<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/plates"><strong>Plates</strong></a> <!-- -->are designed with a range of kiddos in mind – from those as young as 1 to kiddos as old as 8. We know that appetites vary, and so do preferences! That's why our versatile plates are perfect for a diverse age group.</p><p>Whether you have a mini exploring new flavors or a slightly older adventurer with a hearty appetite, our plates have got you covered. And guess what? You've got the freedom to save any leftovers, just as you would with a homemade meal.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">Do you offer meals that don't require heating?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Absolutely! We're thrilled to introduce<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/lunchers"><strong>Lunchers</strong></a> <!-- -->– they're the ultimate in convenience and customization. These are fresh, build-it-yourself meals designed to be enjoyed without any heating. Yes, you heard it right! Our <!-- -->Lunchers<!-- --> are ready for your kiddo to enjoy straight from the fridge or lunchbox.</p><p>Crafted with love and attention, these customizable meals are perfect for busy days, on-the-go adventures, or whenever you and your little one are craving a delicious, no-fuss option. Dive into our <!-- -->Lunchers<!-- --> collection and experience a whole new level of mealtime ease!</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">How do I store my kiddo’s meals, snacks, and cereal?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/babyblends"><strong>Babyblends</strong></a><strong> + </strong><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/smoothies"><strong>Smoothies + YoGos</strong></a><strong>: </strong>Store in the fridge for up to 14 days or in the freezer for up to 2 months. Our special packaging keeps everything fresh, clean, and free of unnecessary additives.</p><p><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/biteables"><strong>Biteables</strong></a><strong> + </strong><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/plates"><strong>Plates</strong></a><strong>: </strong>Refrigerate for up to 7 days, or freeze for up to 2 months to lock in freshness longer.</p><p><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/lunchers"><strong>Lunchers</strong></a><strong>: </strong>Fresh and ready for on-the-go! Store in the fridge for up to 14 days. While freezing isn’t recommended, our packaging ensures they stay tasty and fresh.</p><p><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/snacks"><strong>Snacks</strong></a><strong>, </strong><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/puffs"><strong>Puffs</strong></a><strong> + </strong><a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/baby-cereal"><strong>Baby Cereal</strong></a><strong>: </strong>Perfect for pantry storage! Keep these in a cool, dry place like your cupboard or pantry. No need for refrigeration, making them great for travel and snacking anytime. For extra crunch, seal the package after each use; Veggie Loops stay extra crisp with a chip clip.</p><p><strong>Opened Meals: </strong>Once opened, meals should be kept in the fridge. For the best taste and safety, serve within 48 hours.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">How do I heat my kiddo's meals?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Heating our<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/plates"><strong>Plates</strong></a> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/biteables"><strong>Biteables</strong></a> <!-- -->is a breeze, and you've got options to suit your preferences. Whether you're all about the microwave, stovetop, oven, or the fan favorite air fryer, we've got you covered.</p><p>Each meal comes with clear and easy-to-follow heating instructions right on the packaging. We're all about keeping things simple and delicious! And if you ever find yourself wondering which heating method would make your meal shine, our fantastic Care Team is just a message away. They're always happy to share their favorite recommendations for each particular dish.</p><p>If you're warming your<!-- --> <a role="link" tabindex="0" href="/products/babyblends"><strong>Babyblends</strong></a>, just place in a warm bowl of water or transfer to a heat-safe bowl and heat using the method of your choice. Just be sure to stir so there are no hot spots and test the temperature yourself before offering to your baby.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">Can I choose the meals and quantity myself?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>We love giving you the power to curate the perfect meals for your little ones. Here's how it works: After checkout you'll select the products you want or go with our pre-selected menu (it's totally up to you!) and we'll getting ready to send those tasty Little Spoon meals + snacks your way.</p><p>Before every order we'll send you a friendly reminder via email. That's your cue to log in to your account and dive into your menu. You can explore + choose the exact meals + snacks to put in your upcoming order or fill your box for all upcoming orders if you want the same menu every time. And don't worry, if you're ever in a hurry or just feeling spontaneous, we've got you covered. Our team of meal experts will make sure your box is filled with a variety of our most loved options.</p><p>Whether you're in the mood for those fan-favorite classics or ready to introduce something new, the choice is yours. It's all part of our commitment to making mealtime exciting, delicious, and tailored just for your family. With Little Spoon, you're in full control of your mini's culinary adventure, and our Care Team is always here to help give advice or lend a hand to curate a personalized menu.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">Where do you deliver?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Little Spoon's delivery spans the continental US, reaching doorsteps far and wide. Although we'd love to extend our reach to Alaska and Hawaii, for now, our delivery is restricted to the mainland. When it comes to crossing borders, we're keeping our eyes on the horizon – Canada might just be in our future playbook<!-- --> <span role="img" aria-label="Smile emoji">😉</span>.</p><p>Quick note: we're unable to deliver to PO Boxes so reach out to our amazing Care Team if you need help with your address.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">How soon will my delivery ship after I sign-up?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>Exciting times ahead! Your Little Spoon delivery is all set to make its way to you, and here's how it works:</p><p>If you've locked in your order by Saturday, 5 PM ET, get ready to welcome your mini's meals the very next week. As for your upcoming orders, we've got a those covered too. You can expect your future orders to arrive to your door every two weeks, like clockwork.</p><p>But hey, we know life's all about change – and we're here to accommodate that. Feel free to tweak your delivery schedule, menu, or address from your Little Spoon account. Just remember, any changes you want to make should be wrapped up by 5 PM ET on the Saturday before your delivery week.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-775305b7-0 katZkq"><button aria-expanded="false" class="sc-775305b7-1 fiStjL"><p class="sc-eqUAAy ifeSMT sc-775305b7-2 jDIqBN"><strong class="sc-gEvEer cAmSRL">How are my orders packed?</strong></p><div class="sc-775305b7-3 dselpT"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="sc-jXbUNg bMAKfo sc-775305b7-4 cKBgHu"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#FFFFFF"></circle><title>Add icon</title><path d="M12 2.75v18.5M2.75 12h18.5" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></button><div class="sc-775305b7-5 epLQNM"><div class="sc-775305b7-6 kzTMQq"><div class="sc-775305b7-7 hUwppq"><p>At Little Spoon, we've got your orders covered, literally. We take packing seriously to make sure your goodies arrive as fresh as can be.</p><p>So here's the scoop: every Little Spoon order is packed with lots of love and care. We're talking insulation and coolant to keep things chilly and fresh during their journey to you. We've got the science of freshness down pat.</p><p>But it's not just about great taste – we're all about the environment too. Our packaging is 100% curbside recyclable, because we believe in doing right by our planet. Plus, we're all about creativity, using upcycled insulation and reusable gel packs to minimize waste.</p><p>Once your Little Spoon package lands on your doorstep, it's go time. Pop those meals right into your fridge or freezer until you're ready to dig in. Because your kiddo deserves nothing but the freshest bites, and we're here to make sure you get just that.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></section></main><footer class="sc-d7b49e47-0
